requirement_topic.en: RoHS-like Restricted Substances in EEE — Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT
requirement_topic.zh: 电气电子设备类 RoHS 限用物质——第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣電子設備類 RoHS 限用物質——第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知

summary.en: Vietnam restricts certain hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment (EEE) through Circular No. 30/2011/TT-BCT issued by the Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam's RoHS-like instrument. It sets maximum concentration limits in homogeneous materials for the original RoHS-style substance set: lead (Pb), mercury (Hg), cadmium (Cd), hexavalent chromium (Cr(VI)), polybrominated biphenyls (PBB), and polybrominated diphenyl ethers (PBDE), broadly tracking the limits of 0.1 percent by weight (0.01 percent for cadmium). Scope note: Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT applies to EEE within its defined product scope and is enforced through information disclosure / declaration by the manufacturer or importer rather than through a single substance-test certificate, and its enforcement intensity and exact product coverage differ from the EU RoHS Directive. The four additional phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) added to EU RoHS by Directive (EU) 2015/863 are not within the Circular 30/2011 restricted set. Verify current scope and any superseding instrument before relying on this Circular.
summary.zh: 越南通过工贸部（MOIT）发布的第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知（越南的类 RoHS 工具）限制电气电子设备（EEE）中的某些有害物质。其规定均质材料中原 RoHS 类物质集的最大浓度限值：铅（Pb）、汞（Hg）、镉（Cd）、六价铬（Cr(VI)）、多溴联苯（PBB）及多溴二苯醚（PBDE），大致采用 0.1%（质量分数）限值（镉为 0.01%）。范围说明：第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知适用于其界定产品范围内的 EEE，通过制造商或进口商的信息披露/声明而非单一物质检测证书执行，其执行力度及确切产品覆盖与欧盟 RoHS 指令不同。欧盟指令（EU）2015/863 新增至 RoHS 的 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在第 30/2011 限制物质集内。在依赖本通知前，请核查现行范围及任何替代法规。
summary.zht: 越南通過工貿部（MOIT）發布的第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知（越南的類 RoHS 工具）限制電氣電子設備（EEE）中的某些有害物質。其規定均質材料中原 RoHS 類物質集的最大濃度限值：鉛（Pb）、汞（Hg）、鎘（Cd）、六價鉻（Cr(VI)）、多溴聯苯（PBB）及多溴二苯醚（PBDE），大致採用 0.1%（質量分數）限值（鎘為 0.01%）。範圍說明：第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知適用於其界定產品範圍內的 EEE，通過製造商或進口商的信息披露/聲明而非單一物質檢測證書執行，其執行力度及確切產品覆蓋與歐盟 RoHS 指令不同。歐盟指令（EU）2015/863 新增至 RoHS 的 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在第 30/2011 限制物質集內。在依賴本通知前，請核查現行範圍及任何替代法規。

standards_or_laws: Circular No. 30/2011/TT-BCT (MOIT, Vietnam) — Temporary regulation on permissible content limits of certain hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products (Vietnam RoHS-like; restricts Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the same 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same concentration thresholds. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products) and SJ/T 11364-2014 require a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange for above-threshold / green for below-threshold) on EEE sold in China. The CN regime, like Circular 30/2011, focuses on the original 6 substances and on disclosure/declaration rather than the EU's 10-substance market-restriction model.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖相同 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值相同。中国 RoHS 2（电子电气产品有害物质限制使用管理办法）及 SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（超限为橙色/低于限值为绿色）。中国制度与第 30/2011 通知一样，聚焦原 6 项物质及披露/声明，而非欧盟 10 项物质的市场限制模式。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋相同 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值相同。中國 RoHS 2（電子電氣產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法）及 SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（超限為橙色/低於限值為綠色）。中國制度與第 30/2011 通知一樣，聚焦原 6 項物質及披露/聲明，而非歐盟 10 項物質的市場限制模式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Vietnam's Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT and China's GB/T 26572 both restrict the original 6 substances at the same limits, so a product already compliant with China RoHS substance limits will generally meet the Circular 30/2011 substance thresholds — the substance set is well aligned and narrower than EU RoHS (no 4 phthalates). The gaps are: (1) Circular 30/2011 is enforced through a Vietnamese manufacturer/importer declaration of conformity to the substance limits, so the in-country importer must hold the declaration and supporting evidence — a Chinese disclosure label or GB/T 26572 statement does not automatically discharge the Vietnamese obligation; (2) confirm the precise product scope of the Circular for the specific LED luminaire/lamp and whether a more recent instrument has superseded or supplemented it; (3) documentation should be in Vietnamese-acceptable form. Because Vietnam (like China) does not currently restrict the 4 EU phthalates, no phthalate testing is required for the Vietnam market on this basis — but a product destined also for the EU would need it. Treat the Circular's enforcement scope honestly: it is a declaration-based RoHS-like control, not a per-shipment substance-certificate regime.
gap.zh: 越南第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知与中国 GB/T 26572 均以相同限值限制原 6 项物质，因此已符合中国 RoHS 物质限值的产品通常能满足第 30/2011 通知的物质阈值——物质集对齐良好，且比欧盟 RoHS 更窄（无 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）。差距为：（1）第 30/2011 通过越南制造商/进口商对物质限值的合格声明执行，故境内进口商须持有声明及支持证据——中国披露标识或 GB/T 26572 声明不自动免除越南义务；（2）请就具体 LED 灯具/灯确认该通知的精确产品范围，以及是否有较新法规替代或补充；（3）文件应为越南可接受形式。由于越南（与中国一样）目前不限制欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯，故越南市场基于此无需邻苯二甲酸酯检测——但同时销往欧盟的产品则需要。应如实对待该通知的执行范围：它是基于声明的类 RoHS 控制，而非逐批物质证书制度。
gap.zht: 越南第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知與中國 GB/T 26572 均以相同限值限制原 6 項物質，因此已符合中國 RoHS 物質限值的產品通常能滿足第 30/2011 通知的物質閾值——物質集對齊良好，且比歐盟 RoHS 更窄（無 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）。差距為：（1）第 30/2011 通過越南製造商/進口商對物質限值的合格聲明執行，故境內進口商須持有聲明及支持證據——中國披露標識或 GB/T 26572 聲明不自動免除越南義務；（2）請就具體 LED 燈具/燈確認該通知的精確產品範圍，以及是否有較新法規替代或補充；（3）文件應為越南可接受形式。由於越南（與中國一樣）目前不限制歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯，故越南市場基於此無需鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測——但同時銷往歐盟的產品則需要。應如實對待該通知的執行範圍：它是基於聲明的類 RoHS 控制，而非逐批物質證書制度。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (declaration-based) — Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT restricts 6 hazardous substances in in-scope EEE; the Vietnamese importer/manufacturer must declare conformity to the limits; verify current scope and any superseding instrument
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers the same 6 substances; 4 phthalates not in the CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vietnam's RoHS-like control is Circular 30/2011/TT-BCT, restricting the original 6 substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at limits aligned with China's GB/T 26572, and notably without the 4 EU phthalates. A product compliant with China RoHS substance limits will generally meet the Circular's thresholds, but the in-country Vietnamese importer/manufacturer must hold a declaration of conformity to the limits — a Chinese disclosure label does not discharge the obligation. Confirm the Circular's current product scope and whether any newer instrument applies before relying on it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南的类 RoHS 控制为第 30/2011/TT-BCT 号通知，限制原 6 项物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与中国 GB/T 26572 对齐，且明显不含欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯。符合中国 RoHS 物质限值的产品通常能满足该通知阈值，但境内越南进口商/制造商须持有对限值的合格声明——中国披露标识不免除该义务。在依赖本通知前，请确认其现行产品范围及是否有较新法规适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南的類 RoHS 控制為第 30/2011/TT-BCT 號通知，限制原 6 項物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與中國 GB/T 26572 對齊，且明顯不含歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯。符合中國 RoHS 物質限值的產品通常能滿足該通知閾值，但境內越南進口商/製造商須持有對限值的合格聲明——中國披露標識不免除該義務。在依賴本通知前，請確認其現行產品範圍及是否有較新法規適用。

requirement_topic.zh: 电子废弃物生产者回收——第 16/2015/QD-TTg 号决定
requirement_topic.zht: 電子廢棄物生產者回收——第 16/2015/QD-TTg 號決定

summary.en: Vietnam imposes end-of-life take-back obligations on producers and importers of discarded products, including electrical and electronic equipment, through Prime Minister Decision No. 16/2015/QD-TTg (regulations on retrieval and treatment of discarded products), supported by the Law on Environmental Protection and its extended-producer-responsibility (EPR) provisions and implementing decrees. Producers and importers of in-scope EEE — which can include lamps and lighting equipment containing electronics — are required to organise or contribute to collection and environmentally sound treatment of end-of-life products, establish take-back points, and report. The EPR framework has continued to develop under the 2020 Law on Environmental Protection (effective 2022) and its decrees, which set recycling responsibility and contribution mechanisms. Confirm the current EPR scope, recycling rates, and reporting/financial-contribution obligations applicable to LED lighting with the Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (now within the consolidated environment authority) and current decrees.
summary.zh: 越南通过总理第 16/2015/QD-TTg 号决定（关于报废产品回收和处理的规定），并由《环境保护法》及其延伸生产者责任（EPR）条款和实施法令支持，对报废产品（含电气电子设备）的生产者和进口商施加报废回收义务。范围内 EEE（可包括含电子元件的灯和照明设备）的生产者和进口商须组织或参与报废产品的收集及环境无害化处理、设立回收点并报告。EPR 框架在 2020 年《环境保护法》（2022 年生效）及其法令下持续发展，规定了回收责任及缴费机制。请就适用于 LED 照明的现行 EPR 范围、回收率及报告/财务缴费义务，向自然资源与环境主管部门（现已并入统一环境机构）及现行法令确认。
summary.zht: 越南通過總理第 16/2015/QD-TTg 號決定（關於報廢產品回收和處理的規定），並由《環境保護法》及其延伸生產者責任（EPR）條款和實施法令支持，對報廢產品（含電氣電子設備）的生產者和進口商施加報廢回收義務。範圍內 EEE（可包括含電子元件的燈和照明設備）的生產者和進口商須組織或參與報廢產品的收集及環境無害化處理、設立回收點並報告。EPR 框架在 2020 年《環境保護法》（2022 年生效）及其法令下持續發展，規定了回收責任及繳費機制。請就適用於 LED 照明的現行 EPR 範圍、回收率及報告/財務繳費義務，向自然資源與環境主管部門（現已並入統一環境機構）及現行法令確認。

standards_or_laws: Decision No. 16/2015/QD-TTg (Prime Minister, Vietnam) — Regulations on retrieval and treatment of discarded products (producer/importer take-back of end-of-life products, including EEE)
Law on Environmental Protection (No. 72/2020/QH14, effective 2022) and implementing decrees — Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) for recycling and treatment

summary.en: China's nearest equivalents are the Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council, in force) and the WEEE fund/catalogue system administered under the former Ministry of Environmental Protection / MEE, plus producer responsibility provisions. China operates a WEEE treatment-fund and catalogue mechanism for designated product categories. Lighting/LED lamps are not always within the same designated WEEE catalogue scope as China's core categories, and China's fund-based mechanism differs structurally from Vietnam's take-back/EPR contribution model. There is no mutual recognition between the two systems.
summary.zh: 中国最接近的对应制度为《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（国务院，现行）及由原环境保护部/生态环境部管理的 WEEE 基金/目录制度，并辅以生产者责任条款。中国对指定产品类别实行 WEEE 处理基金及目录机制。照明/LED 灯并不总在与中国核心类别相同的指定 WEEE 目录范围内，且中国基于基金的机制在结构上不同于越南的回收/EPR 缴费模式。两套制度之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國最接近的對應制度為《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（國務院，現行）及由原環境保護部/生態環境部管理的 WEEE 基金/目錄制度，並輔以生產者責任條款。中國對指定產品類別實行 WEEE 處理基金及目錄機制。照明/LED 燈並不總在與中國核心類別相同的指定 WEEE 目錄範圍內，且中國基於基金的機制在結構上不同於越南的回收/EPR 繳費模式。兩套制度之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council, China) and the WEEE treatment-fund/catalogue mechanism (MEE)

gap.en: Vietnam's take-back/EPR obligation (Decision 16/2015/QD-TTg plus the 2020 Law on Environmental Protection and its decrees) attaches to the producer or importer placing EEE on the Vietnamese market and is operationally distinct from China's WEEE fund/catalogue system. The gaps for a Chinese exporter are: (1) the obligation lands on the in-country importer (or a Vietnamese-registered producer), who must register under the EPR scheme, organise/contribute to collection and recycling, and report — Chinese WEEE-fund participation does not satisfy this; (2) confirm whether LED lighting is currently within the in-scope product list and what recycling rate or financial contribution applies, as EPR decrees set category-specific obligations and phase-in dates; (3) commercial contracts between the Chinese manufacturer and the Vietnamese importer should allocate who bears the EPR cost and reporting. This is an ongoing market-presence obligation, not a one-time pre-shipment test. Verify the current EPR decree obligations applicable to lighting before market entry.
gap.zh: 越南的回收/EPR 义务（第 16/2015/QD-TTg 号决定及 2020 年《环境保护法》和其法令）附属于将 EEE 投放越南市场的生产者或进口商，在运作上不同于中国 WEEE 基金/目录制度。中国出口商的差距为：（1）义务落在境内进口商（或越南注册生产者）身上，其须在 EPR 方案下注册、组织/参与收集和回收并报告——中国 WEEE 基金参与不满足此项；（2）请确认 LED 照明当前是否在范围内产品清单中，以及适用何种回收率或财务缴费，因 EPR 法令规定类别特定义务及分阶段日期；（3）中国制造商与越南进口商之间的商业合同应分配由谁承担 EPR 成本及报告。这是持续性市场存在义务，而非一次性出货前检测。进入市场前，请核查适用于照明的现行 EPR 法令义务。
gap.zht: 越南的回收/EPR 義務（第 16/2015/QD-TTg 號決定及 2020 年《環境保護法》和其法令）附屬於將 EEE 投放越南市場的生產者或進口商，在運作上不同於中國 WEEE 基金/目錄制度。中國出口商的差距為：（1）義務落在境內進口商（或越南注冊生產者）身上，其須在 EPR 方案下注冊、組織/參與收集和回收並報告——中國 WEEE 基金參與不滿足此項；（2）請確認 LED 照明當前是否在範圍內產品清單中，以及適用何種回收率或財務繳費，因 EPR 法令規定類別特定義務及分階段日期；（3）中國製造商與越南進口商之間的商業合同應分配由誰承擔 EPR 成本及報告。這是持續性市場存在義務，而非一次性出貨前檢測。進入市場前，請核查適用於照明的現行 EPR 法令義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (ongoing EPR) — producer/importer take-back and recycling obligations apply to in-scope EEE under Decision 16/2015/QD-TTg and the 2020 Law on Environmental Protection EPR decrees; confirm current lighting scope, recycling rate, and contribution
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory by catalogue — China WEEE fund/catalogue obligations apply to designated categories; lighting may fall outside the core designated WEEE catalogue — verify category coverage

source.publisher: Government of Vietnam (Prime Minister Decision 16/2015/QD-TTg; Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment / environment authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vietnam imposes producer/importer end-of-life take-back and recycling obligations on in-scope EEE via Decision 16/2015/QD-TTg and the 2020 Law on Environmental Protection EPR decrees. The obligation lands on the in-country importer or Vietnamese-registered producer and is an ongoing market-presence duty, not a pre-shipment test. China's WEEE fund/catalogue participation does not satisfy it. Confirm whether LED lighting is currently in scope and the applicable recycling rate or financial contribution, and allocate the cost contractually between the Chinese manufacturer and the Vietnamese importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南通过第 16/2015/QD-TTg 号决定及 2020 年《环境保护法》EPR 法令，对范围内 EEE 施加生产者/进口商报废回收义务。义务落在境内进口商或越南注册生产者身上，是持续性市场存在义务，而非出货前检测。中国 WEEE 基金/目录参与不满足此项。请确认 LED 照明当前是否在范围内及适用回收率或财务缴费，并在中国制造商与越南进口商之间通过合同分配成本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南通過第 16/2015/QD-TTg 號決定及 2020 年《環境保護法》EPR 法令，對範圍內 EEE 施加生產者/進口商報廢回收義務。義務落在境內進口商或越南注冊生產者身上，是持續性市場存在義務，而非出貨前檢測。中國 WEEE 基金/目錄參與不滿足此項。請確認 LED 照明當前是否在範圍內及適用回收率或財務繳費，並在中國製造商與越南進口商之間通過合同分配成本。

requirement_topic.en: Conformity Assessment, CR Mark, and Importer of Record vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定、CR 标志与进口登记人 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定、CR 標誌與進口登記人 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Market access for LED luminaires in Vietnam centres on certification of conformity (chung nhan hop quy) to the applicable QCVN national technical regulation — principally QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN for EMC — and affixing the CR conformity mark (dau hop quy) through a designated conformity-assessment body recognised by the Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/STAMEQ). The typical steps are: (1) testing against the QCVN/TCVN requirements at a recognised laboratory; (2) certification or declaration of conformity through a designated body; (3) registration of the declaration with the competent authority; (4) affixing the CR mark on the product/packaging; (5) customs clearance through an in-country importer of record who holds the conformity dossier. Separately, designated lighting must meet MOIT MEPS and carry the MOIT energy label (see ledvn-ecodesign), and luminaires with radio functionality require MIC type approval and a separate conformity mark. There is no manufacturer-only self-declaration equivalent to the EU CE route for the QCVN-mandatory EMC scope without going through the Vietnamese conformity-assessment system.
summary.zh: 越南 LED 灯具的市场准入以对适用 QCVN 国家技术法规（EMC 主要为 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN）的合格认证（chung nhan hop quy）为核心，并经科学技术部（MOST/STAMEQ）认可的指定合格评定机构加施 CR 合格标志（dau hop quy）。典型步骤为：（1）在认可实验室按 QCVN/TCVN 要求检测；（2）经指定机构进行认证或合格声明；（3）向主管机关注册该声明；（4）在产品/包装上加施 CR 标志；（5）通过持有合格卷宗的境内进口登记人清关。另外，指定照明须满足 MOIT MEPS 并加施 MOIT 能效标签（见 ledvn-ecodesign），集成无线电功能的灯具须取得 MIC 型号核准及单独的合格标志。对于 QCVN 强制的 EMC 范围，不经越南合格评定体系，并无相当于欧盟 CE 路径的仅制造商自我声明方式。
summary.zht: 越南 LED 燈具的市場准入以對適用 QCVN 國家技術法規（EMC 主要為 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN）的合格認證（chung nhan hop quy）為核心，並經科學技術部（MOST/STAMEQ）認可的指定合格評定機構加施 CR 合格標誌（dau hop quy）。典型步驟為：（1）在認可實驗室按 QCVN/TCVN 要求檢測；（2）經指定機構進行認證或合格聲明；（3）向主管機關注冊該聲明；（4）在產品/包裝上加施 CR 標誌；（5）通過持有合格卷宗的境內進口登記人清關。另外，指定照明須滿足 MOIT MEPS 並加施 MOIT 能效標籤（見 ledvn-ecodesign），集成無線電功能的燈具須取得 MIC 型號核准及單獨的合格標誌。對於 QCVN 強制的 EMC 範圍，不經越南合格評定體系，並無相當於歐盟 CE 路徑的僅製造商自我聲明方式。

standards_or_laws: QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN — National technical regulation enforced with the CR conformity mark via designated conformity-assessment bodies (MOST/STAMEQ)
TCVN IEC 60598 — Luminaires — General requirements and tests (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 60598, supporting safety conformity)
MIC type approval and conformity for radio/wireless-enabled luminaires (Ministry of Information and Communications)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorised body such as CQC (China Quality Certification Centre). For luminaires/lamps not within mandatory CCC scope, voluntary CQC certification is available. The general luminaire safety standard is GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1 (IEC 60598-based). Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally require SRRC type approval in China. CCC certificates, SRRC approvals, and Chinese test reports are not recognised for Vietnamese QCVN conformity or the CR mark.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授权机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）进行第三方认证。对于非强制 CCC 范围的灯具/灯，可申请自愿性 CQC 认证。通用灯具安全标准为 GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1（基于 IEC 60598）。集成无线功能的灯具在中国还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 证书、SRRC 核准及中国检测报告不被越南 QCVN 合格或 CR 标志所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授權機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）進行第三方認證。對於非強制 CCC 範圍的燈具/燈，可申請自願性 CQC 認證。通用燈具安全標準為 GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1（基於 IEC 60598）。集成無線功能的燈具在中國還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 證書、SRRC 核准及中國檢測報告不被越南 QCVN 合格或 CR 標誌所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
GB 7000.1 / GB/T 7000.1 — Luminaires — General requirements and tests (SAC/SAMR, IEC 60598-based)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Both Vietnam (QCVN/CR) and China (CCC) run mandatory third-party conformity-assessment systems, but they are parallel and non-mutual — a Chinese CCC certificate, GB 7000.1 evidence, and SRRC approval do not satisfy the Vietnamese QCVN/CR or MIC requirements, and vice versa. Key Vietnam-specific points for a Chinese exporter: (1) certification of conformity must be obtained through a Vietnam-designated conformity-assessment body, and the CR mark affixed before customs clearance; (2) an in-country importer of record must hold the conformity dossier, the registered declaration, and bear the MEPS/energy-label and EPR take-back responsibilities; (3) the IEC 60598 safety base is shared with GB 7000.1, so testing transfers technically, but a Vietnamese-acceptable report and the CR conformity are still separate; (4) smart luminaires need MIC type approval (analogous to but separate from China's SRRC); (5) product marking, labels, and instructions must be in Vietnamese. Plan a distinct Vietnamese conformity exercise rather than relying on existing CCC.
gap.zh: 越南（QCVN/CR）与中国（CCC）均实行强制性第三方合格评定体系，但二者并行且不互认——中国 CCC 证书、GB 7000.1 证据及 SRRC 核准不满足越南 QCVN/CR 或 MIC 要求，反之亦然。中国出口商的越南特定要点：（1）须经越南指定合格评定机构取得合格认证，并在清关前加施 CR 标志；（2）境内进口登记人须持有合格卷宗、已注册声明，并承担 MEPS/能效标签及 EPR 回收责任；（3）IEC 60598 安全基础与 GB 7000.1 共享，检测技术上可迁移，但越南可接受的报告及 CR 合格仍为独立项；（4）智能灯具须取得 MIC 型号核准（与中国 SRRC 类似但独立）；（5）产品标志、标签及说明须为越南语。应规划独立的越南合格评定，而非依赖现有 CCC。
gap.zht: 越南（QCVN/CR）與中國（CCC）均實行強制性第三方合格評定體系，但二者並行且不互認——中國 CCC 證書、GB 7000.1 證據及 SRRC 核准不滿足越南 QCVN/CR 或 MIC 要求，反之亦然。中國出口商的越南特定要點：（1）須經越南指定合格評定機構取得合格認證，並在清關前加施 CR 標誌；（2）境內進口登記人須持有合格卷宗、已注冊聲明，並承擔 MEPS/能效標籤及 EPR 回收責任；（3）IEC 60598 安全基礎與 GB 7000.1 共享，檢測技術上可遷移，但越南可接受的報告及 CR 合格仍為獨立項；（4）智能燈具須取得 MIC 型號核准（與中國 SRRC 類似但獨立）；（5）產品標誌、標籤及說明須為越南語。應規劃獨立的越南合格評定，而非依賴現有 CCC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — QCVN conformity certification and the CR mark via a designated body are required before customs clearance; MIC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires; in-country importer of record required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/STAMEQ), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vietnam market access for LED luminaires requires QCVN conformity certification (primarily QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN) and the CR mark through a Vietnam-designated body, an in-country importer of record holding the dossier, plus MOIT MEPS/energy-label and (for smart luminaires) MIC type approval. China's CCC, GB 7000.1 evidence, and SRRC approval are parallel and non-mutual and do not satisfy the Vietnamese requirements. The shared IEC 60598 base reduces engineering rework, but the Vietnamese conformity, CR mark, Vietnamese-language labelling, and importer responsibilities remain a separate exercise.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南 LED 灯具市场准入须经越南指定机构取得 QCVN 合格认证（主要为 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN）及 CR 标志、设立持有卷宗的境内进口登记人，并满足 MOIT MEPS/能效标签及（智能灯具的）MIC 型号核准。中国 CCC、GB 7000.1 证据及 SRRC 核准为并行且不互认，不满足越南要求。共享的 IEC 60598 基础减少工程返工，但越南合格、CR 标志、越南语标签及进口商责任仍为独立工作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南 LED 燈具市場准入須經越南指定機構取得 QCVN 合格認證（主要為 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN）及 CR 標誌、設立持有卷宗的境內進口登記人，並滿足 MOIT MEPS/能效標籤及（智能燈具的）MIC 型號核准。中國 CCC、GB 7000.1 證據及 SRRC 核准為並行且不互認，不滿足越南要求。共享的 IEC 60598 基礎減少工程返工，但越南合格、CR 標誌、越南語標籤及進口商責任仍為獨立工作。
